Name: DecalParam
Description: Determines the parameters that govern decals.

Fields.Name: Texture ID
Fields.Description: Texture ID

Fields.Name: Placement: Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Dummy polygon ID for decal generation. If specified by TAE, it will be the value of TAE.

Fields.Name: Placement: Up/Down Offset
Fields.Description: The reference angle offset (up and down). In degrees

Fields.Name: Placement: Left/Right Offset
Fields.Description: The reference angle offset (left and right). In degrees

Fields.Name: Placement: Near Distance
Fields.Description: Decal placement near distance. In metres.

Fields.Name: Placement: Far Distance
Fields.Description: Decal placement far distance. In metres.

Fields.Name: Placement: Size at Near Distance
Fields.Description: Size at the near distance. In metres.

Fields.Name: Placement: Size at Far Distance
Fields.Description: Size at the far distance. In metres.

Fields.Name: Placement Trigger: SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: If SpEffect ID is not -1, then decal is only applied if the specified SpEffect is present.

Fields.Name: Texture Replacement based on Material
Fields.Description:
When generated by an attack hit, change the texture depending on the defense material in 1.
New texture ID = blood material ID * 10000000 + original texture ID

Fields.Name: Placement: Dummy Polygon Category
Fields.Description: Where to search for the dummy polygon ID.

Fields.Name: Is Deferred Decal
Fields.Description: If ON, acts as a deferred decal.

Fields.Name: Is Paint Decal
Fields.Description: If ON, acts as a paint decal.

Fields.Name: Is Affected by Blood Decals
Fields.Description: Affected by optional blood decal, ID +1000 in mild, cannot be pasted if hidden.

Fields.Name: Enable Normal Mask
Fields.Description: If ON, use normal mask (supports normal and shininess texture).

Fields.Name: Enable Parallel Occlusion Mapping (POM)
Fields.Description: If ON, use parallel occlusion mapping.

Fields.Name: Enable Emissive Mask
Fields.Description: If ON, use emissive mask.

Fields.Name: Is Placed Vertically
Fields.Description: Enable if the decal is to be placed vertically.

Fields.Name: Random Placement: Minimum Scale %
Fields.Description: When placing the decal, what is the minimum scale it can be randomly placed at.

Fields.Name: Random Placement: Maximum Scale %
Fields.Description: When placing the decal, what is the minimum scale it can be randomly placed at.

Fields.Name: Random Placement: Minimum Roll Angle
Fields.Description: When placing the decal, what is the minimum roll angle it can be randomly placed at. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Random Placement: Maximum Roll Angle
Fields.Description: When placing the decal, what is the maximum roll angle it can be randomly placed at. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Random Placement: Minimum Pitch Angle
Fields.Description: When placing the decal, what is the minimum pitch angle it can be randomly placed at. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Random Placement: Maximum Pitch Angle
Fields.Description: When placing the decal, what is the maximum pitch angle it can be randomly placed at. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Random Placement: Minimum Yaw Angle
Fields.Description: When placing the decal, what is the minimum yaw angle it can be randomly placed at. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Random Placement: Maximum Yaw Angle
Fields.Description: When placing the decal, what is the maximum yaw angle it can be randomly placed at. In degrees.

Fields.Name: POM: Height Scale
Fields.Description: The height scale to use with parallel occlusion mapping.

Fields.Name: POM: Minimum Sample Count
Fields.Description: The minimum sample count to use with parallel occlusion mapping.

Fields.Name: POM Sample - Maximum Count
Fields.Description: The maximum sample count to use with parallel occlusion mapping.

Fields.Name: Blend Mode
Fields.Description: Blend mode to use for this decal.

Fields.Name: Flying Decal: Direction Type
Fields.Description: Reference coordinates that determine the direction in which the decal will fly.

Fields.Name: Emissive: Start Value
Fields.Description: The start value used in the emissive mask.

Fields.Name: Emissive: End Value
Fields.Description: The end value used in the emissive mask.

Fields.Name: Emissive: Interpolation Time
Fields.Description: The interpolation time from start value to end value.

Fields.Name: Enable Interpolation
Fields.Description: Do you generate at the time when the bar is extended due to the decal generation via TAE?

Fields.Name: Enable Interpolation (for Tank)
Fields.Description: Do you generate at the time when the bar is extended due to the decal generation via TAE?

Fields.Name: Interpolation: Interval
Fields.Description: Distance to interpolate decals generated between TAE bars when interpolation is enabled. In metres.

Fields.Name: Interpolation: Texture ID at Start
Fields.Description: Texture ID at the start of interpolation (-1 uses textureID).

Fields.Name: Interpolation: Texture ID at End
Fields.Description: Texture at the end of interpolation Texture ID (-1 uses textureID).

Fields.Name: Placement: Particle ID
Fields.Description: SFXID issued when the decal is placed (-1 means none).

Fields.Name: Placement: Particle Offset
Fields.Description: Offset distance applied to the SFX generation position

Fields.Name: Mask Texture ID
Fields.Description: Mask texture ID (-1 uses textureID).

Fields.Name: Albedo Texture ID
Fields.Description: Albedo texture ID (-1 uses textureID).

Fields.Name: Mask Strength
Fields.Description: Mask strength (currently valid only with deferred decals)

Fields.Name: Normal Texture ID
Fields.Description: Normal texture ID (-1 uses textureID).

Fields.Name: Displacement Texture ID
Fields.Description: Displacement texture ID (-1 uses textureID).

Fields.Name: Emissive Texture ID
Fields.Description: Emissive texture ID (-1 uses textureID).

Fields.Name: Albedo Color: R
Fields.Description: Albedo color R

Fields.Name: Albedo Color: G
Fields.Description: Albedo color G

Fields.Name: Albedo Color: B
Fields.Description: Albedo color B

Fields.Name: Has Placement Duration
Fields.Description: Is a duration set?

Fields.Name: Metallic Scale
Fields.Description: Metallic scale (1.0 equal size)

Fields.Name: Shininess Scale
Fields.Description: The strength of shininess.

Fields.Name: Placement: Duration
Fields.Description: The duration of the decal after placement. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Placement: Fade-Out Time
Fields.Description: Fade out time for the decal. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Placement: Priority
Fields.Description: Decals with a priority higher than others will stay over lower priorities. (-1 does not disappear)

Fields.Name: Apply Decal Thin-out on Placement
Fields.Description: Whether to thin out nearby decals after placement.

Fields.Name: Enable Alignment Variation
Fields.Description: If ON, one variation number randomly determined for each texture other than 0 will be applied. The number of non-zero variations must be the same.

Fields.Name: Decal Thin-out: Checked Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which decals are checked and subsequently thinned-out.

Fields.Name: Decal Thin-out: Checked Angle
Fields.Description: The angle from the placed decal at which decals are checked and subsequently thinned-out.

Fields.Name: Decal Thin-out: Maximum Angle
Fields.Description: If the angle is greater than or equal to this number, thin out

Fields.Name: Decal Thin-out: Checked Value
Fields.Description: How many recent items should be checked for thinning?

Fields.Name: Placement: Frame Delay
Fields.Description: When trying to apply a decal, it actually gets applied after this frame. Based on 30 FPS.

Fields.Name: Albedo Texture Variations
Fields.Description: Number of random variations of albedo texture (including 0th, 2 for 2 textures)

Fields.Name: Mask Texture Variations
Fields.Description: Number of random variations of mask texture (including 0th, 2 for 2 textures)

Fields.Name: Metallic Variations
Fields.Description: Number of random variations of metallic texture (including 0, 2 is 2 textures)

Fields.Name: Normal Texture Variations
Fields.Description: Number of random variations of normal texture (including 0th, 2 for 2 textures)

Fields.Name: Displacement Texture Variations
Fields.Description: Number of random variations of displacement texture (including 0th, 2 for 2 textures)

Fields.Name: Emissive Texture Variations
Fields.Description: Number of random variations of emissive textures (including 0th, 2 for 2 textures)

Fields.Name: Placement: Fade-In Time
Fields.Description: Fade in time for the decal. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Decal Thin-out: Overlap Multiplier Radius
Fields.Description: Determine if it is a duplicate within the range of decal size multiplied by this value

Fields.Name: Decal Thin-out: Neighbor Addition Radius
Fields.Description: Determine if it is nearby based on the decal size plus this distance. In metres.

Fields.Name: Decal Thin-out: Overlap Limit Number
Fields.Description: The number of decals that can be duplicated within the overlap radius.

Fields.Name: Decal Thin-out: Neighbor Limit Number
Fields.Description: The number of decals that can be duplicated within the neighbor radius.

Fields.Name: Decal Thin-out: Mode
Fields.Description: Thinning mode for the decal.

Fields.Name: Emissive Color: R
Fields.Description: Emissive color R

Fields.Name: Emissive Color: G
Fields.Description: Emissive color G

Fields.Name: Emissive Color: B
Fields.Description: Emissive color B

Fields.Name: Decal Particle: Upper Angle Limit for Generation
Fields.Description: The maximum angle limit when generating the decal particle.

Fields.Name: Placement: Generated Asset ID
Fields.Description: The asset to generate when the decal is placed.

Fields.Name: Generated Asset: Up/Down Offset
Fields.Description: Random placement for the asset. The reference angle offset (up and down). In degrees

Fields.Name: Generated Asset: Left/Right Offset
Fields.Description: Random placement for the asset. The reference angle offset (up and down). In degrees

Fields.Name: Generated Asset: Minimum Display Time
Fields.Description: Random placement for the asset. The minimum time the generated asset is displayed for. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Generated Asset: Maximum Display Time
Fields.Description: Random placement for the asset. The maximum time the generated asset is displayed for. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Generated Asset: Minimum Fade Time
Fields.Description: Random placement for the asset. The minimum time the generated asset is faded by. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Generated Asset: Maximum Fade Time
Fields.Description: Random placement for the asset. The maximum time the generated asset is faded by. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Generated Asset: Minimum Animation ID
Fields.Description: Random playback will be performed from animations with IDs between the lower limit and above and the upper limit. If the upper limit is -1, try to play the animation for this item.

Fields.Name: Generated Asset: Maximum Animation ID
Fields.Description: Random playback will be performed from animations with IDs between the lower limit and above and the upper limit. If the lower limit is -1, try to play the animation for this item.

Fields.Name: Reference Decal ID
Fields.Description: ID of decal to reference (if -1, other entered number will be used).
